connectionDetails.name: host
connectionDetails.label: Host
connectionDetails.description: Hostname or IP address of the SQL Server instance

connectionDetails.name: port
connectionDetails.label: Port
connectionDetails.description: Port on which SQL Server is listening (default: 1433)

connectionDetails.name: instanceName
connectionDetails.label: Instance Name
connectionDetails.description: Named SQL Server instance (leave blank for default instance)

connectionDetails.name: databaseName
connectionDetails.label: Database Name
connectionDetails.description: Name of the target SQL Server database

connectionDetails.name: encrypt
connectionDetails.label: Encrypt Connection
connectionDetails.description: Whether to encrypt data sent between the client and server

connectionDetails.name: trustServerCertificate
connectionDetails.label: Trust Server Certificate
connectionDetails.description: If true, the driver will not validate the server SSL certificate (useful for dev/test)

connectionDetails.name: integratedSecurity
connectionDetails.label: Use Windows Authentication (Integrated Security)
connectionDetails.description: Use Windows authentication instead of SQL Server authentication. If true, username and password are not required.

connectionDetails.name: loginTimeout
connectionDetails.label: Login Timeout (seconds)
connectionDetails.description: Number of seconds to wait before timing out a connection attempt

connectionDetails.name: applicationName
connectionDetails.label: Application Name
connectionDetails.description: Optional application name for tracing in SQL Server logs

connectionDetails.name: sendStringParametersAsUnicode
connectionDetails.label: Send String Parameters as Unicode
connectionDetails.description: Determines whether string parameters are sent to the server as Unicode or ANSI
